text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the day of the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inside the venue, many fans eagerly await the
appearance of Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Is it almost time? I can't wait to see her run.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You said Manhattan Cafe is also running? They
seem to butt heads quite often, no?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That other time, Agnes Tachyon proclaimed her
as her rival, you know?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Oh really? Then we're in for a show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Agnes Tachyon is paying a visit to
Manhattan Cafe's prep room.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello. How are you doing, Cafe? Did you
sleep well?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to focus... so can you please leave me
alone?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ha-ha-ha! It's assuring to see you're your normal
self!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, I intend on going all out today.
Since you're my rival, I hope you would do the
same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe shoots a glance at the hand
extended her way.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I... will not become your punching bag.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I will outrun you, and catch up to my friend.
That's why I'm here, after all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying that, she accepts the handshake. A fire
burns in her eyes, to which Agnes Tachyon nods
with a smile.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't expect anything less!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rising excitement outside the runners' tunnel
is almost tangible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's waiting for the living legend Agnes
Tachyon to arrive.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, I can feel their energy! The determining
factors of significance are all here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What a disappointment it would be if I failed to
surpass my limits now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Indubitably, Trainer! Keep your eyes on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She turns and takes off in a brisk jog towards the
light at the end of the tunnel.
